title: ICEPURE BORPLFTR50 Replacement for Bosch Ultra Clarity Pro Water Filter, Compatible with 12033030, 12028325, 11025825, WFC100MF, B36CT80SNS, B36CL80ENS, BORPLFTR55, WFS200MF 2PACK
features: High-Efficiency Filtration：ICEPURE RWF6100A (replacement for BORPLFTR50) reduces up to 99% of chlorine, taste, odor, THM, VOCs, particles, and other major impurities. It preserves beneficial minerals while significantly improving drinking water taste for pure, fresh hydration.

Wide Compatibility & Leak-Proof Fit：Fits models including 12033030, BORPLFTR50, BORPLFTR55, REPLFLTR55, RA450022, WFC100MF, B36CT80SNS, B30BB935SS, etc. Advanced precise measurement and 3D multi-dimensional design ensure full compatibility with original products and no water leaks.

Safe Premium Materials：Crafted with BPA-free, food-safe components and advanced coconut shell carbon. The 0.5-micron outer layer enhances filtration, and carbon blocks are third-party tested to remove heavy metals, large sediments, and hazardous contaminants.

Authoritative Certifications & Advanced Tech：Built with US technology and strict quality control—every product undergoes 5 inspection and testing stages. Backed by authoritative material certifications, ensuring compliance with high industry standards.

Tool-Free Installation & Brand Reliability：Easy to install without tools. Replace every 6 months or 300 gallons (whichever comes first, varies by water quality). ICEPURE is a 20-year professional water treatment brand with global sales, trusted by countless families worldwide.

specifications_table.Benefits: Reduces impurities and improves taste of drinking water
